---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# Loading in the data and creating various dataframes for analysis
all_estes <- read.csv()
righty_estes <- filter(BatterSide == "Right")
rGood_estes <- filter(BatterSide == "Right") %>%
                filter(PitchCall == "StrikeSwinging" | 
                      PitchCall == "InPlay" & ExitSpeed < 75)
lefty_estes <- filter(BatterSide == "Left")
lGood_estes <- filter(BatterSide == "Left") %>%
                filter(PitchCall == "StrikeSwinging" | 
                      PitchCall == "InPlay" & ExitSpeed < 75)
                
```
```{r}
# Pitch Usage Plot

# Create PitchUsage Variable Here
ggplot(data = righty_estes, 
       mapping = aes(x = TaggedPitchType, 
                     y = PitchUsage))
      geom_boxplot(fill = "#31a354")
```


```{r}
# Insert Code to make strike zone here
```

```{r}
# Create a heat map for overall pitch usage then create heat map for whiffs
```


```{r}
# Being able to find a pitch before AND a pitch after a Good Pitch
```



```{r}
# movement_profile_only.R

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(rlang)

# ----------------------------
# Column map using your names
# ----------------------------
column_map <- list(
  pitcher_name = "Pitcher",
  pitcher_id = "PitcherId",
  pitcher_hand = "PitcherThrows",
  batter_side = "BatterSide",
  pitch_type = "TaggedPitchType",
  velocity = "RelSpeed",
  spin_rate = "SpinRate",
  ivb = "InducedVertBreak",
  hb = "HorzBreak",
  extension = "Extension",
  release_height = "RelHeight",
  release_side = "RelSide",
  plate_x = "PlateLocSide",
  plate_z = "PlateLocHeight",
  zone_speed = "ZoneSpeed",
  vert_appr_angle = "VertApprAngle",
  horz_appr_angle = "HorzApprAngle",
  event = "PlayResult",
  pitch_call = "PitchCall",
  strikes = "Strikes",
  balls = "Balls",
  inning = "Inning",
  outs_before = "Outs",
  outs_on_play = "OutsOnPlay",
  runs_scored = "RunsScored",
  game_date = "Date",
  batter = "Batter",
  pa_id = "PAofInning",
  pitch_number = "PitchNo",
  exit_velocity = "ExitSpeed"
)

# -----------------------------------------
# Optional pitch type map
# Edit this to match your preferred labels
# -----------------------------------------
pitch_type_map <- c(
  "FourSeamFastBall" = "4-Seam",
  "Fastball" = "4-Seam",
  "Four-Seam" = "4-Seam",
  "Sinker" = "Sinker",
  "TwoSeamFastBall" = "Sinker",
  "Cutter" = "Cutter",
  "Slider" = "Slider",
  "Sweeper" = "Sweeper",
  "Curveball" = "Curveball",
  "ChangeUp" = "Changeup",
  "Splitter" = "Splitter"
)

# -----------------------------------------
# Pitch colors
# Edit as desired
# -----------------------------------------
pitch_colors <- c(
  "4-Seam" = "#1f66dc",
  "Sinker" = "#39d5e6",
  "Cutter" = "#39c27f",
  "Slider" = "#5a2fd6",
  "Sweeper" = "#ef40b4",
  "Curveball" = "#ff4b2b",
  "Changeup" = "#f2a93b",
  "Splitter" = "#8b5a2b"
)

standardize_columns <- function(df, column_map) {
  rename_pairs <- list()

  for (std_name in names(column_map)) {
    raw_name <- column_map[[std_name]]
    if (raw_name %in% names(df)) {
      rename_pairs[[std_name]] <- rlang::sym(raw_name)
    }
  }

  if (length(rename_pairs) == 0) {
    return(df)
  }

  dplyr::rename(df, !!!rename_pairs)
}

standardize_pitch_types <- function(df, pitch_type_map = NULL) {
  if (!"pitch_type" %in% names(df)) {
    return(df)
  }

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(pitch_type = as.character(pitch_type))

  if (is.null(pitch_type_map) || length(pitch_type_map) == 0) {
    return(df)
  }

  df %>%
    mutate(pitch_type = dplyr::recode(pitch_type, !!!pitch_type_map))
}

make_movement_profile <- function(data,
                                  pitcher,
                                  report_date = NULL,
                                  min_usage = 0.01,
                                  point_size = 5,
                                  output_file = NULL,
                                  width = 8,
                                  height = 8,
                                  dpi = 320) {
  df <- data %>%
    standardize_columns(column_map) %>%
    standardize_pitch_types(pitch_type_map)

  required_cols <- c("pitcher_name", "pitch_type", "hb", "ivb")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(report_date) && "game_date" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(game_date = as.Date(game_date)) %>%
      filter(game_date == as.Date(report_date))
  }

  df <- df %>%
    filter(
      pitcher_name == pitcher,
      !is.na(pitch_type),
      !is.na(hb),
      !is.na(ivb)
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    stop("No movement data found for that pitcher/date combination.", call. = FALSE)
  }

  total_pitches <- nrow(df)

  df <- df %>%
    group_by(pitch_type) %>%
    mutate(pct = n() / total_pitches) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(pct >= min_usage)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = hb, y = ivb)) +
    ggforce::geom_circle(
      aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 25),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linetype = "dashed",
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_circle(
      aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 20),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      fill = NA
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_circle(
      aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 15),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linetype = "dashed",
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_circle(
      aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 10),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      fill = NA
    ) +
    ggforce::geom_circle(
      aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 5),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linetype = "dashed",
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = 0, y = -25, xend = 0, yend = 25),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = -25, y = 0, xend = 25, yend = 0),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_point(
      aes(fill = pitch_type),
      alpha = 0.8,
      shape = 21,
      color = "black",
      stroke = 0.5,
      size = point_size
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = 20, y = 0, label = "20", vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1.2) +
    annotate("text", x = 10, y = 0, label = "10", vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1.2) +
    annotate("text", x = -20, y = 0, label = "20", vjust = -0.5, hjust = -0.2) +
    annotate("text", x = -10, y = 0, label = "10", vjust = -0.5, hjust = -0.2) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 20, label = "20", hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = -20, label = "20", hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 10, label = "10", hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = -10, label = "10", hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = -18.5, y = 25, label = "\u2190 Towards 1B", color = "black", size = 5, hjust = 0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 18.5, y = 25, label = "Towards 3B \u2192", color = "black", size = 5, hjust = 0.5) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      name = "Horizontal Movement (in)",
      limits = c(-25, 25),
      breaks = seq(-20, 20, by = 10)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Induced Vertical Movement (in)",
      limits = c(-25, 25),
      breaks = seq(-20, 20, by = 10)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pitch_colors, guide = "none") +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff", color = NA),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.4),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20)
    )

  if (!is.null(output_file)) {
    ggsave(output_file, p, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi, bg = "white")
  }

  p
}

# ----------------------------
# Example usage
# ----------------------------
game_data <- read.csv("CalPoly_UCSB_4-2-26.csv")
p <- make_movement_profile(
data = game_data,
pitcher = "Naess, Griffin",
report_date = NULL,
   output_file = "naess_movement_profile.png"
)
#
print(p)
```
